text.title: Selling Ideas Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes by observable signal to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: halt — return to mom-test discovery first

branch.question: format == elevator or executive or one-pager?

conclusion.verdict: lead with insight; full SPIN; concrete CTA + date
Pyramid structure + SPIN body + CTA box

text.example: pain_validated=true → format=executive → conclusion challenger-insight-required → executive pitch with insight + full SPIN + CTA.
